allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); proj=d['projects']['customer-portal']; print\('outputPath:', proj['architect']['build']['options'].get\('outputPath'\)\); print\('i18n:', json.dumps\(proj.get\('i18n'\), indent=2\)\); print\('configs:', list\(proj['architect']['build']['configurations'].keys\(\)\)\)")
